children.heading: Suits at law or equity
children.label: a Suits at law or equity
children.text: Unless otherwise limited as in section 3607 or 3608 of this title, any person aggrieved by a violation of this chapter may sue at law or in equity.

children.heading: Recovery of actual damages
children.label: b Recovery of actual damages
children.text: In any action authorized by this section for a violation of section 3607 or 3609 of this title where actual damages have been suffered, such damages may be awarded or such other relief granted as deemed fair, just, and equitable.

children.heading: Contribution
children.label: c Contribution
children.text: Every person who becomes liable to make any payment under this section may recover contributions from any person who if sued separately, would have been liable to make the same payment.

children.heading: Amounts recoverable; defendant’s attorneys’ fees
children.label: d Amounts recoverable; defendant’s attorneys’ fees
children.text: The amounts recoverable under this section may include interest paid, reasonable attorneys’ fees, independent engineer and appraisers’ fees, and court costs. A defendant may recover reasonable attorneys’ fees if the court determines that the cause of action filed by the plaintiff is frivolous, malicious, or lacking in substantial merit.
